violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. -Wet cloth used at espresso machine is not kept in a solution between uses. -Sani Bucket found at less than 150ppm Quat.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Bar shake pitcher left dirty from yesterday's service.
Available, adequate capacity, able to maintain proper temperature (4 pts deducted)
